data.title: Shiso City in Hyogo Prefecture, Japan, offers new tourism resources, 90 mins from Kyoto and Osaka.报道: New tourism resources in Shiso City, Hyogo Prefecture, Japan, 90 mins from Kyoto and Osaka.
data.description: Shiso City in Hyogo Prefecture, Japan, situated in the central-western region, has emerged as a popular spot for nature-based tourism. The city is conveniently located about 90 minutes by car from both Kyoto and Osaka. With its abundant natural beauty and opportunities for outdoor activities, Shiso City has seen a surge in visitors looking to immerse themselves in the tranquil surroundings. This trend is indicative of the growing interest in eco-tourism and outdoor adventures in the region.

data.title: SEC and CFTC collaborate on crypto oversight; Atkins and Selig to address roles amidst Senate review.
data.description: Paul Atkins from the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Michael Selig from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) are set to address the oversight of cryptocurrencies by their respective agencies. This discussion comes as legislation is being processed in the Senate to determine the roles of the SEC and CFTC in regulating the crypto market.

data.title: CRV: At $0.37, oversold conditions signal potential recovery to $0.40-$0.46 in 2-4 weeks as Curve hits critical support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency CRV is currently being traded at a price of $0.37, with technical indicators suggesting that it is in an oversold condition. Analysts are predicting a target price range of $0.40 to $0.46 within the next 2 to 4 weeks as the cryptocurrency Curve nears critical support levels.

data.title: TON price may hit $2.00-$2.40 by February 2026. Short-term target: $1.61-$1.70; breakout level at $1.97.
data.description: Summary Prediction for TON Price: In the short term (1 week), the target price is estimated to be in the range of $1.61 to $1.70. Looking at a slightly longer timeframe, the medium-term forecast (1 month) suggests a range between $2.00 and $2.40. The level considered for a bullish breakout is at $1.97, identified as the Upper Bollinger Band.
